name: Florida v. Georgia
question: Did Florida meet its burden of showing that its injuries could be redressed by a degree capping Georgia's upstream water consumption if the decree does not also bind the Corps?
description: A case in which the Court held that Florida made a legally sufficient showing as to the possibility of fashioning an effective remedial decree equitably apportioning the waters of the Apalachicola-Chattahoochee-Flint River Basin (ACF Basin).
